chat.title: Assistant
chat.empty: Ask the assistant anything. It can call your enabled plugin tools.
chat.keyPrompt: Add your Anthropic API key to start chatting. It is stored encrypted on this device and never leaves the main process.
chat.approvalBody: The assistant wants to run {{tool}} with these inputs:

providers.title: AI settings
providers.subtitle: Choose your provider and model (BYOK). Keys are stored encrypted on this device and never leave the main process.
providers.keyHint: Each provider keeps its own key; switching providers does not clear it.
providers.budgetHint: Stop a turn once it spends this many tokens. Leave empty or 0 for no limit.

mcp.title: MCP servers
mcp.subtitle: Connect external Model Context Protocol servers. Their tools become available to the assistant, gated by the same approval rules.
mcp.idHint: Stable identifier (letters, numbers, - and _). Used to namespace tools.
mcp.name: Name
mcp.urlHint: Streamable HTTP endpoint; SSE is used as a fallback.
mcp.headersHint: KEY=value, one per line. Avoid storing secrets here.
mcp.commandHint: Executable to launch, e.g. npx or node.
mcp.envHint: KEY=value, one per line. Avoid storing secrets here.

home.quickActionsHint: Common tasks from the home page so you don't have to dig into settings.

trustedSources.title: Trusted plugin sources
trustedSources.subtitle: Choose which plugin package sources Synapse exposes in the desktop app.

policy.officialMarketplaceHint: Show only packages resolved by the Synapse marketplace backend.
policy.anyUrlHint: Allow marketplace and URL-backed package sources exposed by the client.
policy.localSynHint: Only expose local package import from files on this device.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Switch between light and dark, or pick an accent color.

feature.title: App Launcher
feature.subtitle: Summon a command palette from anywhere to launch installed apps.
feature.aboutBody: Press the global shortcut to open a search box. Installed apps are indexed automatically.

feature.title: Floating Ball
feature.subtitle: Keep a small launcher control on the desktop and open radial shortcuts around it.
feature.aboutBody: Enable it in Settings to show the desktop ball. Click the ball to open its radial menu, or right-click it to close it.

settings.title: Floating Ball
settings.subtitle: Show a desktop shortcut ball and choose which tools appear in its radial menu.
settings.enableHint: Disabled by default at startup until you turn it on here.
settings.menuFeaturesHint: Choose up to 6 tools. The floating ball itself is not a menu tool.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Manage built-in, installed, and development plugins.
plugins.unavailableBody: Plugin management is only available inside the desktop app.
plugins.emptyBody: No built-in, installed, or development plugins are registered yet.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.body: Changes are saved to the plugin preference store.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Discover and install Synapse plugins.
marketplace.unavailableBody: The marketplace is only available inside the desktop app.
marketplace.loadingHint: Fetching the registry and checking installed plugins.
marketplace.empty: No marketplace plugins match your filters.
marketplace.protectedSource: This plugin is provided by {{source}} and cannot be reinstalled from the marketplace.

governance.emptyMine: No plugins published by this account.
governance.signInRequired: Sign in to manage your marketplace plugins.
governance.defaultReportReason: Reported from the Synapse desktop app.

account.prompt: Complete GitHub authorization in your browser.
account.dialogDescription: Synapse opened the GitHub authorization page in your browser. After you authorize, this window will continue automatically.
account.waiting: After approval, Synapse will connect your marketplace account automatically.
account.secureHint: The app only receives a marketplace session after GitHub confirms the request.

marketplace.comingSoonBody: The sidebar entry is ready; Git registry browsing and install flows will land in the marketplace PR.
marketplace.gitIntegrationHint: P0 marketplace installation will use HTTPS registry fetches and package hash verification instead of a local git dependency.

lan.title: LAN Transfer
lan.subtitle: Find nearby devices on the same network and send files quickly.
lan.unavailableBody: LAN transfer is available in the Synapse desktop app.
lan.restartRequired: Restart Synapse to use LAN transfer. Close the app and open it again.
lan.securityBody: When connecting to a new device for the first time, both devices show a security code. Confirm that the numbers match before sending files. You can choose whether to save received files.

discovery.title: Find nearby devices
discovery.subtitle: When enabled, other Synapse devices on the same network can find this device, and you can see them here.

devices.title: Nearby devices
devices.subtitle: Before sending files to a new device, confirm a security code once.
devices.emptyBody: Make sure the other device is on the same network and has “Find nearby devices” enabled in Synapse.

pairings.title: Confirm new device
pairings.subtitle: The device you are connecting to shows a six-digit code. Enter it here to connect.
pairings.showCodeHint: Enter this code on the device that started the connection.
pairings.enterCodeBody: Enter the six-digit code shown on {{name}} to connect.
pairings.invalidCode: That code is incorrect. Check the other device and try again.

transfers.title: File transfers
transfers.subtitle: Track sent and received files here. Interrupted transfers can resume.
transfers.emptyBody: Connect to a nearby device, then choose a file to send.

settings.title: Launcher
settings.subtitle: Summon the command palette from anywhere with a global shortcut.
settings.hotkeyHint: You can manually enter Electron shortcut syntax, or click to capture and then press the key combination. Shortcut combinations that are already in use may not be captured; please use unused combinations or enter them manually.
settings.invalid: Could not register that combination. The previous shortcut is still active.
